autonomousOrchestration: Cursor executes roadmap/priorities/deps autonomously; owner observes /operations/command (Russian) and edits /operations/priorities — no ChatGPT relay.
ownerLanguageRule: Владелец видит только русский интерфейс. Английский — код и технические детали (свёрнуто).
ownerDirective: PRIMARY: EAS APK 1.0.7 → field validation 8/8. Google auth готов. Параллельно: FGS + route intelligence. Долгосрок: Maps OS + Fuel Intelligence (roadmap only).
editPolicy: Owner edits via /operations/priorities (authenticated) → JSON + feed audit; Cursor re-reads each cycle.
nextImplementationTarget: EAS Build Driver (preview) 1.0.7 → FINISHED → manifest → Маршруты 8/8 → /operations/live
executionNotes: Field validation 8/8 + portal report inbox (/operations/live paste). BG gate hint on device when 8/8. CI: test:field-validation-report in repo:verify. Device gate: owner paste report after 8/8.

priorities.title: AION Maps & Driver Runtime OS
priorities.rationale: Core differentiation: реальный километраж, road matching, операционная карта смены, runtime routing. Сейчас — roadmap, ADR, dependency graph, self-host architecture planning.
priorities.nextAction: Зафиксировать этапы GPS Intelligence → AI-native Maps; не начинать tile/routing engine до 8/8

priorities.title: Operational Fuel & Cost Intelligence
priorities.rationale: Реальные расходы водителя: умная заправка, ₽/100 км, прибыль после топлива, распределение топлива по классам km (связь с Maps). Сейчас — data model + milestones, без full allocation engine.
priorities.nextAction: Roadmap: smart refuel → GPS allocation → AI economics → интеграция с AION Maps

priorities.title: Driver Intelligence Core
priorities.rationale: MASTER §11–12: модуль Driver должен быть полезен в реальной жизни до расширения экосистемы.
priorities.nextAction: APK 1.0.6 → Маршруты 8/8 → paste отчёт; backfill + stop zones на реальных сменах

priorities.title: Unified shift runtime + profit path
priorities.rationale: MASTER §14–15: один runtime path, strict shift state machine.
priorities.nextAction: Закрепить operationalCosts; без дублирующей математики в UI

priorities.title: OCR production queue
priorities.rationale: MASTER §18: retry, dedupe, offline, replay — без ручного ввода топлива.

priorities.title: APK release loop (device-verified)
priorities.rationale: EAS eb4250a2 FINISHED; manifest 1.0.6 на Vercel; signoff YES — осталось device 8/8 + paste отчёта.

priorities.title: Android background runtime (production)
priorities.rationale: MASTER §26: FGS stability, reconnect, OEM — experimental path есть, production gate нет.

priorities.title: Overlay Driver HUD
priorities.rationale: MASTER §24: €/ч, rental profit, warnings — зависит от runtime.
priorities.nextAction: Native HUD fields после unified runtime

priorities.title: Ecosystem control portal
priorities.nextAction: Auth hardening + Supabase write on Vercel prod

priorities.title: Route + heatmap intelligence
priorities.rationale: MASTER §19–21: только из real GPS — после trip store.

dependencyGraph.reason: MASTER §21: no fake heatmaps — requires trip history

dependencyGraph.reason: Route timeline + rollups + stop zones live; field validation 8/8 unlocks production FGS gate

dependencyGraph.reason: Стратегия · roadmap only: GPS Intelligence → Road Matching → Operational Map → Runtime Routing → AI-native Maps. Без map engine до architecture branch.

cursorAdaptationRules: strategic + roadmap_only → document in feed, never start map/fuel engine without explicit owner go
Execute critical + high before medium/low unless blocked by dependencyGraph
blocked level or status=blocked → document in feed, pick next actionable node
experimental → no fully_done without validation evidence
User ownerDirective overrides default queue when explicit conflict
